element_introduction_order.element: Enemy variety (Pickelman, Watchers, basic projectile enemies)
Robot Master boss patterns (e.g., Cut Man slashes, Fire Man projectiles)
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Learning attack patterns and telegraphed moves

element_introduction_order.element: Special Weapons (Cut Weapon, Fire Storm, Ice Slasher, etc.)
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Weapon cycling and ammunition management; strategic weapon selection for future stages
Creating temporary platforms to reach otherwise inaccessible areas

element_introduction_order.first_appears: After all 6 Robot Master stages completed
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Combining learned skills and weapons; no stage re-entry allowed
Facing a familiar pattern with unknown timing variations

rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Non-linear stage selection allows player-controlled tension pacing in first half; second half (Wily stages) enforces escalating difficulty with no retreat option

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Magnet Beam enables secret/optional platforming paths in Elec Man stage

difficulty_curve.early_game: Player chooses initial Robot Master stage; lower difficulty options available (e.g., Cut Man considered more accessible entry point)
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Weapon weakness matching strategy becomes critical; later Robot Master stages demand learned weapon use and pattern memorization
difficulty_curve.late_game: Wily Castle stages introduce no-reentry mechanic and chained difficulty; final boss confrontation combines all mastered skills
notable_spikes: Transition from stage select freedom to locked Wily Castle progression
Guts Man stage (earthquake mechanic) requires specific platforming precision
Wily Boss final encounter after surviving 4 linked Wily stages

notable_level_patterns.description: Six stages available in any order; weapon weakness system encourages optimal sequencing but does not enforce it. Players can tackle stages in any sequence and return to completed stages except Wily levels.
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Stage Select Screen (middle of game, unlocks 7th Wily stage when all 6 cleared)

notable_level_patterns.description: Linear left-to-right progression through stage space populated with combat encounters and platforming obstacles; concludes with single Robot Master boss at endpoint.
Four chained stages with no individual stage re-entry; health carries over between stages but weapon ammunition resets. Escalating pattern complexity and final boss confrontation.
Specific weapons unlock platforming paths (e.g., Magnet Beam enables secret/optional navigation); encourages replay and non-linear mastery.
